message:
🐛 Fix dashboard stats showing 0 or incorrect values

Compute page:
- Add totalGPUs to currentStats calculation
- Update GPUs stat to use actual data instead of hardcoded 0

GitOps page:
- Add useHelmReleases hook to get helm release count
- Update helm stat to show actual release count

Network page:
- Update endpoints stat to show services count (each service
  creates an endpoint in Kubernetes)

Nodes page:
- Add CPU and memory utilization calculations
- Cache utilization values to prevent showing 0 during refresh
- Update cpu_util and memory_util stats to show percentage values

Operators page:
- Import formatMemoryStat for consistent memory formatting
- Update memory and storage stats to use formatMemoryStat
  (shows "14.4 TB" instead of "14772 GB")

Security stat blocks:
- Change 'high' severity color from orange to red to match
  the actual severity display colors in Security page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -132,7 +132,7 @@ export const NETWORK_STAT_BLOCKS: StatBlockConfig[] = [
 export const SECURITY_STAT_BLOCKS: StatBlockConfig[] = [
   { id: 'issues', name: 'Issues', icon: 'ShieldAlert', visible: true, color: 'red' },
   { id: 'critical', name: 'Critical', icon: 'AlertCircle', visible: true, color: 'red' },
-  { id: 'high', name: 'High', icon: 'AlertTriangle', visible: true, color: 'orange' },
+  { id: 'high', name: 'High', icon: 'AlertTriangle', visible: true, color: 'red' },
   { id: 'medium', name: 'Medium', icon: 'AlertTriangle', visible: true, color: 'yellow' },
   { id: 'low', name: 'Low', icon: 'Info', visible: true, color: 'blue' },
   { id: 'privileged', name: 'Privileged', icon: 'ShieldOff', visible: true, color: 'red' },
